name: MetaMask — unlock wallet
description: Opens MetaMask's popup in a new tab and unlocks it with a password from the credential vault. Pattern is reusable for OKX, Phantom, and other wallets — just swap extension_id and the unlock-button selector. Requires: (1) MetaMask installed in the pool and assigned to this profile, (2) a Vault item with the wallet's password (referenced as {vault.<id>.password}). The unlock state lives in the extension's IndexedDB inside the profile's user-data-dir, so this only needs to run after fresh launches.
